folio.label: 139r
folio.l: And for my werk , rigút no thyngö wol I axe
My lord and I , ben ful of oon accor¶
I made hire , to the worshipe of my lord
So do I , alle myne othere , creatures
What colour that they han , or what figures
Thus semetú me , that nature wolde seye
This mayde of age , twelue ©er was and tweye
In whicú that nature , hadde swicú delit
For rigút as she kan peynte , a lilye whit
And reed as Rose , rigút witú swicú peynture
She peynted hatú , this noble creature
Er she were born~ , vp oon hire lymes free
Where as by rigút , swicú coloures shulde bee
And Phebus dyed hatú , hire tresses grete
Lyke to the stremes , of his burned hete
And if that excellent , was hir beaute
A thousand fold , moore vertuous was she
In hire ne lakked , no condiciouö
That is to preyse , as by discreciouö
As wel in goost as body , chaast was she
For whicú she floured , in virginite
Witú alle humylite , and abstinence
Witú alle attem¹ance , and pacience
Witú mesure eke , of berynge and array
Discret she was , in answerynge alwey
Thougú she were wys Pallas , dar I seyn
Hire facounde eke , ful wo~manly and pleyn
Noo countrefeted termes , had she
To msemeseme&i;&i;&i;se&i;&i;&i;ewys , but aftir hire degree this is a correction from something else. Double check./ODR/
She spak , and alle hire wordes more & lesse
Sovnyngö in vertu , and in gentillesse
Shamefast she was , in maydens shamefastnesse
Constant in herte , and euäe in bisinesse
To dryue hir out , of ydel slogardye
Bacus had of hir moutú , rigút no maistrie
For wyn and ©outhe , dootú Venus encrees
As men in fyr , wol casten oille , or grees
And of hire owene vertu , vnconstreyned
She hatú ful ofte tyme Syke , hirö feyned
For that she wolde fleen , the compaignye
Where likly was , to treten of folye
As is at festes , reuels , and at daunces
That ben occasiouns , of daliaunces
Swicú thyngö , maken children for to be
To sone rype , and bold as men moun se
